FAQs

Here are some frequently asked questions about InheritX

1. What is Inherit X?
Inherit X Is A Secure Online Platform That Helps You Plan And Share Your Assets With Your Chosen Beneficiaries — Simply And Stress-Free.
2. How is this different from traditional inheritance planning?
3. IS MY INFORMATION SAFE?
4. CAN I CHANGE MY PLAN LATER?
5. DO I NEED A LAWYER TO USE INHERIT X?
6. HOW DO BENEFICIARIES GET NOTIFIED?
7. WHAT TYPES OF INHERITANCE PLANS CAN I CREATE?
